feat.name: Tip the Scales
feat.text: You’re a cunning adversary in close quarters and are well-versed in hit-and-run tactics that exploit the advantages of your small stature. As part of your training, you learned what to do when you’re grabbed or restrained. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to checks to Escape, and after resolving a successful Escape action, you can immediately use your reaction to Step or to Shove or Trip the creature from whom you just Escaped.

traits.name: Kobold
traits.text: A creature with this trait is a member of the kobold ancestry, reptilian humanoids who are usually Small and typically have darkvision. An ability with this trait can be used or selected only by kobolds.
